registry_basis: P1 selftest/atlas_atom_proofs.py — in-repo symbolic / closed-form proofs of deterministic real-limit identities (Caspar-Klug 1962, Griffith-Orgel 1957, MWC 1965, Douglass 2013 / Han 2020 / Gadd 2017, Roos-Taylor-Siegbahn 1980). Each atom maps to the simulator file(s) whose 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL classification rests on the same identity, so the proof anchors the upgrade proposal 🟢 → 🔵 SUPPORTED-FORMAL.
registry_authority: selftest/atlas_atom_proofs.py (proof roster); selftest/hexa_verify_tier_batch.py (tier reporter — consumer of this registry via selftest/atlas_atom_tier_upgrade_gate.py)
registry_scope: in-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8). The 🔵-eligibility is a PROJECT-LEVEL claim about the symbolic correctness of the identity each sim numerically recomputes — NOT a therapeutic, clinical, regulatory, immunogenic, or efficacy claim.

atoms.real_limit_citation: Caspar & Klug, Cold Spring Harb Symp Quant Biol 1962;27:1-24 (quasi-equivalence T-number ladder; 12 pentamer invariant; n_subunits=60T; n_hexamers=10(T-1); Euler V-E+F=2)
atoms.proof_method: exact-integer identities over the standard T ∈ {1,3,4,7,13,21} ladder (no floats)
atoms.tier_upgrade_proposal: 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL → 🔵 SUPPORTED-FORMAL for the listed sims (subject to per-sim review by the project owner)

atoms.real_limit_citation: Griffith & Orgel, Q Rev Chem Soc 1957;11:381-393 (octahedral CFSE closed forms in units of Δ_oct for d^0..d^10 HS/LS; square-planar strong-field aufbau sum)
atoms.proof_method: exact-rational table (fractions.Fraction) reproducing the closed-form CFSE values; no floats in any acceptance decision
atoms.tier_upgrade_proposal: 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL → 🔵 SUPPORTED-FORMAL for the listed sim (subject to per-sim review by the project owner)

atoms.real_limit_citation: Monod, Wyman & Changeux, J Mol Biol 1965;12:88-118 (concerted two-state allosteric partition Z=1+L; P_R+P_T=1)
atoms.proof_method: symbolic (sympy when available) + exact-rational panel (fractions.Fraction) — either path PASS-ing is sufficient; both PASS when sympy is installed
atoms.tier_upgrade_proposal: 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL → 🔵 SUPPORTED-FORMAL for the listed sims (subject to per-sim review by the project owner)

atoms.real_limit_citation: Douglass 2013 / Han 2020 ternary mass-action partition (Z=1+g+e+α·g·e); Gadd et al. Nat Chem Biol 2017 (cooperativity α framework). Sum of fractions f_free + f_binary_target + f_binary_PPI + f_ternary = 1 identically.
atoms.proof_method: symbolic (sympy when available) + exact-rational panel (fractions.Fraction) over a rational (g, e, α) triple panel
atoms.tier_upgrade_proposal: 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL → 🔵 SUPPORTED-FORMAL for the listed sims (subject to per-sim review by the project owner)

atoms.real_limit_citation: Roos, Taylor & Siegbahn, Chem Phys 1980;48:157-173 (CASSCF / (2e,2o) small-active-space pattern). Standard 2x2 real-symmetric linear algebra: E_FCI = (E_a+E_b)/2 - sqrt(((E_b-E_a)/2)^2 + K^2) is the lower root of det(H - λI) = 0.
atoms.proof_method: symbolic polynomial identity via sympy: simplify(det(H - E_FCI·I)) ≡ 0 in (E_a, E_b, K). SKIPs honestly (g7) if sympy is not installed on host — identity is provable by hand but not machine-verifiable in stdlib-only mode.
atoms.skip_condition: sympy not installed on host (g7 skip-is-honest)
atoms.tier_upgrade_proposal: 🟢 SUPPORTED-NUMERICAL → 🔵 SUPPORTED-FORMAL for the listed sims (subject to per-sim review by the project owner). Note: metallodrug_quantum_vqe_cross.py self-declares 🟠 DEFERRED on the live-VQE dispatch hand-off (project-level claim); the in-repo CI core is the 🔵-eligible portion.

honesty.i3_reporter_classification_unchanged_on_: The I3 tier reporter (selftest/hexa_verify_tier_batch.py) is the project-level claim recorder; this registry + its consumer gate produce an UPGRADE PROPOSAL only. The I3 reporter's classification stays as-is unless the project owner edits the sim source to self-declare 🔵 SUPPORTED-FORMAL.

governance_anchors.g1_real_limits_first: Each atom carries a peer-reviewed real-limit citation (Caspar-Klug 1962 · Griffith-Orgel 1957 · MWC 1965 · Douglass 2013 / Han 2020 / Gadd 2017 · Roos-Taylor-Siegbahn 1980).
governance_anchors.g7_skip_is_honest: Atoms whose proof depends on sympy SKIP (not FAIL) when sympy is unavailable on host.
governance_anchors.g8_in_silico_only: A 🔵-eligibility verdict is a project-level claim about symbolic correctness of the identity ONLY — never a therapeutic / clinical / regulatory / immunogenic / efficacy claim.
